overall_comment: Both required figures are clean, on-style, and clearly communicate that the closed form sin(x) + 0.1 x^2 matches the target with machine-zero residual and pure-noise residual structure.

issues.issue: Panel (a) legend has a single entry (±σ_noise = 0.03) which duplicates what the shaded band already implies, adding minor visual noise.
issues.fix: Drop the legend in panel (a) and instead label the band inline with a small gray text annotation.

issues.issue: Headline metric (test MSE = 0) is absent from the narrative figure; a reader seeing only narrative.png must infer success from residual std vs sigma comparison.
issues.fix: Add measured metric to the suptitle.
